# pinkNoise

**Instance Property**

An estimate of the pink noise of the sensor.

## Declaration

```swift
let pinkNoise: Double
```

## Discussion

The total pink noise variance estimate in the [doc://com.apple.sensorkit/documentation/SensorKit/SRPhotoplethysmogramOpticalSample/normalizedReflectance-15f2k] signal (Normalized Units²).

## Accessing noise terms

- **whiteNoise**: An estimate of the white noise of the sensor.
- **backgroundNoise**: An estimated timeseries of ambient noise intrusion.
- **backgroundNoiseOffset**: The white noise variance estimate in the background noise signal.
